## Summary
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Changes
- [ ] Added: New features
- [ ] Changed: Modified existing behavior
- [ ] Fixed: Bug fixes
- [ ] Removed: Deprecated features

## Testing
- [ ] All tests pass (`pytest pyext/tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Type checking passes (`mypy pyext/`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`black pyext/`, `isort pyext/`)
- [ ] Benchmarks run (`python pyext/examples/benchmark.py`)

## Code Review Checklist
- [ ] No compiler warnings (`cargo check`)
- [ ] Docstrings added/updated for public APIs
- [ ] Type stubs (`syntect.pyi`) updated if API changed
- [ ] Edge cases handled (empty strings, Unicode, etc.)
- [ ] Error messages are clear and helpful
